# PantryPal Changelog

## v1.0.1
- Rebuilt the Cabin UI home layout to better match the approved two-phone mockup.
- Added a follow-up approved-mockup alignment pass with denser mobile dashboard spacing, wider premium header treatment, and more app-like navigation.
- Reordered Home into Cabin Dashboard, Pantry Health, Tonight’s Dinner, Smart Shopping Recommendation, and Pantry Value cards.
- Reduced oversized dashboard whitespace with compact score/stat treatment.
- Polished the premium dark pine header, app-style navigation, softer/wider cards, and cozier log cabin interior background.
- Kept pantry inventory, Supabase, scan, recipes, grocery list, staple targets, and partial-use tracking intact.

## v1.0.0
- Released Cabin UI Rewrite.
- Refined the mobile-first app shell with a dark pine header and bottom phone navigation.
- Reworked the visual system with cream rounded cards, warmer cabin lighting, and less repetitive horizontal log-wall styling.
- Polished dashboard, pantry cards, grocery items, buttons, spacing, and responsive layouts.
- Added a shopping recommendation card with a trip-value placeholder for future savings, mileage, and drive-time scoring.
- Preserved Supabase inventory, scanning, recipes, grocery list, staple targets, and partial-use tracking.

## v0.8.0
- Added Home dashboard
- Pantry Score
- Staples at a Glance
- Critical Low Staples
- Rush City grocery planning
- Northwoods / cabin theme
- Mild recipe preferences
- More tab
- Grocery planning preview

## Planned v0.9
- Weekly grocery ads
- Live price comparison
- Intelligent shopping trips
- Price history
- Receipt improvements
